_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop independent cybersecurity audit processes for application software, networks, and systems
reference_document_element_description: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Task SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-T-009 (AG, cosine: 0.434), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.418).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.569). Shared vocabulary: [application, audit]. NICE-only terms [cybersecurity, develop, independent, networks, processes, software] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, ai, controls, defenses, filtering, implement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.895, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 11-word NICE element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Develop independent cybersecurity audit processes for application software, netw" and "Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.521 ≈ STS 0.569 (gap 0.048). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [application, audit] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [application, audit]. NICE-only: [cybersecurity, develop, independent, networks, processes, software]. WIDAI-only: [access, ai, controls, defenses, filtering, implement].
